mocks_used: fixture-backed gitcode client test double for external GitCode adapter dependency only

scenarios.description: TestSyncStateMachine inserts a stale cache record and verifies GetSyncStatus returns stale for the stable id before sync.
TestSyncStateMachine runs SyncToCache with fixture-backed remote data, then verifies updated source content, fresh status, and succeeded sync_events evidence with counts.
TestSyncLockContention holds the cache lock, calls SyncToCache, verifies typed ErrLockContention, zero remote fetches, and unchanged source rows.
TestSyncRetry uses a fixture-backed adapter that returns ErrRateLimited before success and verifies service-level retry plus one successful reconciliation commit.
TestSyncIdempotencyReplay repeats a successful idempotency key while a lock is held and verifies Replayed=true, no remote replay call, and prior event reuse.
TestSyncBoundedStaging forces MaxSize staging failure and verifies no partial source mutation plus failed sync-event evidence.

notes.offline: Validation uses local Go tests and in-memory/cache-local fixtures only; live GitCode network validation remains disabled.
notes.target_product_path: The run script exercises the service API through existing Go tests that call GetSyncStatus and SyncToCache against real cache behavior with only the external GitCode dependency stubbed.
